comments.body:
this is basically the same as before but this is now using primitives from containers/image instead of having `LayersCommand` in the containers/image API (which was ugly)

I think this is how copy is working atm
so this patch should not break atomic based on https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/127#discussion_r68758886

(the other notable change is that the manifest does not go through `fixManifestDigests`.)

Looks fine (and it’s great to get rid of `LayersCommand`), only blocked on `containers/image` update and replacing the vendoring commit.
done the vendoring, I'll merge after tests finish
